title: Better Roleplay RP
description: 🎮 Enhance your Minecraft RolePlay with deep immersion and built-in voice chat. 🗣️
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01811d530c04dee78ce74b2f7892dde875423d55.jpeg)


## What is Better RP? 🤔


**🌍 Minecraft Modpack - Optimized & Immersive Survival (Public) 🎮**
Looking for a better survival experience without losing the soul of vanilla Minecraft? This pack is for you!


**🔧 Performance-Friendly**

Smooth gameplay even on mid-range PCs, with a well-balanced selection of lightweight mods.


**🎤 Built-in Voice Chat**

No more typing in the middle of a fight — talk directly with nearby players thanks to proximity voice chat for full immersion.


**🌲 Ambience & Quality of Life Mods**

- Minimap, OptiFine-style zoom, shader-compatible
- Cleaner HUD and menus
- Enhanced soundscape for a more realistic vibe
- User-friendly UI improvements


**⚔️ Enhanced Survival Gameplay**

- Slightly revamped mobs
- Useful new items that keep the vanilla feel
- Improved world generation with subtle additions


**🔓 Public & Plug-and-Play**
Just install it, join a server or play solo, and enjoy right away.


📦 Perfect for players who love vanilla survival, but want a richer, more immersive experience with no fuss.


.
🎮 Immersive Minecraft RP modpack with voice chat 🗣️, realistic sounds 🌲, and performance boosts ⚙️. Optimized for low RAM and higher FPS. Lightweight and easy to install – perfect for semi/full RP servers! 🌍📦


<details>
<summary>Showcase images</summary>

![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aecce48ee6e561186318f109dee389827977727c.jpeg)

</details>


## First Start with the Modpack 🤔

To get started quickly, here are the main key bindings to configure:

### 🗺️ Xaero’s World Map

Set a key to open the World Map (recommended: M)
This allows you to view the full map instantly.


### 🎙️ Simple Voice Chat

Open Voice Chat settings → Assign:
- A Push-to-Talk key
- A Whisper key (optional but recommended)

**That’s it! ✨**
Once these keys are set, your game is ready to play — simple and fast.


<details>
<summary>Shadres ☀️</summary>

![Shadres ☀️](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec81462b09952208a0d27c6f65d3a18e580d1299.jpeg)

</details>



## ✨ Shaders (Optional)

This modpack already includes integrated shaders, pre-configured for the best visual quality and performance balance.

You can enable them and choose the one you prefer directly in the video settings. 😉
